name: Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the brisket with soy sauce.
2. Season the brisket with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
3. Place the brisket fat side up in a preheated oven and broil until seared.
4. Spread onion soup mix on top of the brisket and moisten with 1/4 cup water.
5. Pour the remaining water into the pan.
6. Continue roasting at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 4 hours, basting every half hour.
7. Turn the brisket occasionally to ensure even cooking.
8. Add additional water to the pan as needed throughout the cooking process.
9. Allow the brisket to rest before carving.
